steps.title: Find the growth pattern
steps.content: France and Japan were already at least 70% urban in 1970, so they do not explain much of the later worldwide increase. Algeria must instead show a lower 1970 level and a substantial rise by 2020.

steps.title: Reject inaccurate values
steps.content: A and B overstate Algeria's 2020 value by claiming around 90%. C understates both the starting and ending values. The graph's pattern is about 40% urban in 1970 and more than 70% urban in 2020. The answer is D.
